systems.name: opencode
systems.description: Self-hosted Claude-Code-derivative CLI/server/TUI/webapp bundle; this spec modifies its autonomous runloop gating behaviour

containers.name: opencode runtime (packages/opencode)
containers.description: Bun server process hosting session workflow, runloop, storage, and tool dispatch

containers.name: user environment
containers.description: Shell, TUI, webapp; source of trigger signals and plan-builder invocations

components.name: autorun-gate
components.description: New helper isAutorunArmed(sessionID) that reads Storage + validates R1-R3 preconditions

components.name: arm-intent-detector
components.description: Message-ingest-time regex scan of tweaks.cfg phrase list; emits arm signal when match + R1 + R2 hold

components.name: session-spec-binding-store
components.description: Storage key namespace [session_active_spec, sessionID] with write/read/invalidate ops

components.name: autorun-flag-store
components.description: Storage key namespace [autorun_armed, sessionID] with atomic flip and Bus event emit

components.name: tweaks-cfg-reader
components.description: Existing TweaksConfig loader extended with autorun.trigger_phrases and autorun.demote_on_disarm keys

components.name: todolist-refill
components.description: Parser+materializer that reads bound spec tasks.md next unchecked phase and calls TodoWrite tool

components.name: disarm-observer
components.description: Bus subscriber that watches user-message / blocker / abort events and flips autorun flag via C5

components.name: plan-promote-script
components.description: Extended with --session flag; writes C4 binding; invokes MCP question tool after promotion

components.name: plan-write-scripts
components.description: plan-amend/revise/extend/refactor/sync scripts share a r6-demote.ts helper that checks state and demotes

components.name: r6-demote-helper
components.description: Shared scripts/lib/r6-demote.ts: if state=implementing, demote to planned + disarm before caller's operation

components.name: mcp-question-tool
components.description: Already-registered MCP tool invoked by plan-promote-script for R3b arming question

relationships.description: flips armed flag on successful match
returns refilled todolist to runner decision
flips armed flag to false on interruption
invokes MCP question tool for R3b
user answer flips armed flag via plan-promote return path
